title: Classic Switzerland in 7 Days
subtitle: Zurich, Lucerne, Interlaken, Zermatt, and Geneva
description: The ultimate first-timer's route hitting Switzerland's greatest highlights — from vibrant cities to iconic Alpine peaks. This itinerary covers the Jungfraujoch, Matterhorn, Lake Geneva, and charming old towns, all connected by scenic train rides.

itinerary.title: Arrive in Zurich
itinerary.description: Explore Zurich's old town (Altstadt), stroll along the Limmat river, visit Bahnhofstrasse, and take in views from Lindenhof hill. Evening at a lakeside restaurant.
itinerary.transport: Airport to city: 10 min by train
itinerary.tip: Get a Zurich Card for free public transport and museum entry

itinerary.title: Zurich to Lucerne
itinerary.description: Morning train to Lucerne (45 min). Walk across Chapel Bridge, visit the Lion Monument, and explore the charming old town. Afternoon boat cruise on Lake Lucerne.
itinerary.tip: The Swiss Museum of Transport is perfect if weather turns

itinerary.title: Mount Pilatus Day Trip
itinerary.description: The Golden Round Trip: boat from Lucerne to Alpnachstad, cogwheel railway up Pilatus, cable car down to Kriens, bus back to Lucerne. One of Switzerland's best day trips.
itinerary.transport: All included in Golden Round Trip ticket

itinerary.title: Lucerne to Interlaken & Jungfraujoch
itinerary.description: Morning train to Interlaken via the scenic Brünig Pass. Afternoon ascent to Jungfraujoch – Top of Europe. Views of the Aletsch Glacier from 3,454m.
itinerary.tip: Book Jungfraujoch early — morning slots are less cloudy

itinerary.title: Interlaken to Zermatt
itinerary.description: Scenic train through the Lötschberg tunnel to Zermatt. Afternoon cable car to Matterhorn Glacier Paradise (3,883m) for 360° views of 38 Alpine peaks.
itinerary.tip: Zermatt is car-free — take the shuttle train from Täsch

itinerary.title: Zermatt to Geneva via Montreux
itinerary.description: Morning train through the Rhône valley. Stop in Montreux to visit Château de Chillon, then continue to Geneva. Evening walk along Lake Geneva with views of Jet d'Eau.

itinerary.title: Geneva & Departure
itinerary.description: Visit the United Nations, the Reformation Wall, and the old town. Lake Geneva cruise if time allows. Head to Geneva Airport for departure.
itinerary.transport: Geneva city to airport: 7 min by train
